zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibella Bodrugan於1315年出生在英國史洛普爾布福德時，她的父親Otto de Bodrugan25歲，母親Margaret Champernon26歲。她於1334年與Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford在英國史洛普爾布福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1349年在英國史洛普爾布福德享年35歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibella Bodrugan于1315年出生在英国史洛普爾布福德时，她的父亲Otto de Bodrugan25岁，母亲Margaret Champernon26岁。她于1334年与Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford在英国史洛普爾布福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1349年在英国史洛普爾布福德享年35岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Sibella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibella Bodrugan was born in 1315, in Burford, Shropshire, England, her father, Otto de Bodrugan, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Champernon, was 26. She married Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford in 1334, in Burford, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died about 1349, in Burford, Shropshire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibella Bodrugan est née en 1315, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Otto de Bodrugan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Champernon, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford en 1334, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1349, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibella Bodrugan 1315 in Burford, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto de Bodrugan 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Champernon 26. Sie hat 1334 in Burford, Shropshire, England Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1349 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Burford, Shropshire, England und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibella Bodrugan è nata il nel 1315 nel Burford, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Otto de Bodrugan, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Champernon, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford nel 1334, nel Burford, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1349, nel Burford, Shropshire, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Burford, Shropshire, England.

ja.Burford, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Sibella Bodruganが1315年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで生まれた時，父Otto de Bodruganは25歳，母Margaret Champernonは26歳であった。1334年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードでRichard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1349年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで35歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibella Bodrugan(이)가 1315년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto de Bodrugan(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Champernon(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1349년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibella Bodrugan nasceu em 1315, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Otto de Bodrugan, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Champernon, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford em 1334, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1349, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibella Bodrugan родилась в 1315 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Otto de Bodrugan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Champernon, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford в 1334 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла около 1349 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibella Bodrugan nació en 1315, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Otto de Bodrugan, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Champernon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richard Cornwall 2nd Baron Burford en 1334, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1349, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
